title: Patronus AI lands $50M to build ‘digital worlds’ that stress-test AI agents
slides: Can you trust your AI agent in the wild?
Patronus AI just raised $50M to find out.
Their tool builds digital worlds that attack your model.
Failures appear before your agent reaches real users.
Run one stress test today before going live.
thread_text:
1. Can you trust your AI?

Patronus AI just raised $50 million to build stress tests that attack your model before it goes live.

2. Their tool simulates attacks.

It creates digital worlds designed to provoke failures you didn't anticipate.

3. Failures caught early matter.

Problems appear before your agent ever reaches a real user, saving reputation and cost.

4. One test reveals blind spots.

You see exactly where your model breaks under pressure you didn't design for.

5. Run one stress test today.

Take your current agent prompt and simulate an adversarial scenario. Have you done it yet?

script: Can you trust your AI agent?
Patronus AI just raised fifty million.
They build worlds that attack your model.
Failures appear before users see them.

instagram.caption:
Your AI agent can now be attacked in a simulated digital world before it ever reaches a real customer.

Patronus AI just raised $50M to build stress tests that poke holes in your model. 🧪 They create environments designed to provoke failures you didn’t anticipate.

For anyone shipping AI tools, this means blind spots surface before they damage your reputation. One test shows precisely where your agent breaks under pressure you didn’t design for.

Have you run your current agent prompt through an adversarial scenario yet? 🚨

carousel_slides.hook: Your AI is lying to you.
carousel_slides.description: Patronus AI raised $50M to build digital worlds that attack your model before launch.
Their tool creates adversarial scenarios that stress-test your AI agent until it breaks.
Problems appear in simulation so you can fix them before your agent goes live.
See exactly where your model breaks under pressure you didn't design for.

carousel_slides.hook: Save this post, test your agent.
carousel_slides.description: Take your current agent prompt and run one adversarial simulation on Patronus AI.
